scripts.dev:api:python: cd backend/agent-backend-python && uv run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8081
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @tang-agent/core-types build && pnpm --filter @tang-agent/agent-core build && pnpm --filter @tang-agent/sdk-ts build && pnpm --filter @tang-agent/ui build && pnpm --filter @tang-agent/agent-backend-ts build && pnpm --filter @tang-agent/web build && pnpm --filter @tang-agent/cli build && pnpm --filter @tang-agent/desktop-electron build
